recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Arrives On Streaming This Week As Michael Jackson Movie Eyes Music Biopic Record - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ Arrives On Streaming This Week As Michael Jackson Movie Eyes Music Biopic Record. The Michael Jackson biopic *Michael*, starring Jaafar Jackson, is set to debut on digital streaming this week as the film pushes toward the record set by the 2018 biopic about Queen and its late lead singer Freddie Mercury. That film, of course, is *Bohemian Rhapsody*, which currently holds the all-time box office record as the highest grossing music biopic of all time with a worldwide box office tally of $911 million. Now, six years after the film’s triumph at the global box office and the Oscars, Michael is not only steadily approaching *Bohemian Rhapsody’s* record box office take, the actor who plays Michael Jackson — his nephew Jaafar — is arguably already a contender for a Best Actor Oscar. Given the King of Pop’s enormous popularity in Japan — the documentary *Michael Jackson’s This Is It* made $57 million in the country in 2009 — industry trade publication *Deadline* projects that *Michael* will seize the all-time global box office record from *Bohemian Rhapsody* after it opens in Japan on July 12.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》即將上線串流平台，並有望打破《波希米亞狂想曲》的票房紀錄，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Arrives On Streaming This Week As Michael Jackson Movie Eyes Music Biopic Record - Yahoo News UK
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ Arrives On Streaming This Week As Michael Jackson Movie Eyes Music Biopic Record. The Michael Jackson biopic *Michael*, starring Jaafar Jackson, is set to debut on digital streaming this week as the film pushes toward the record set by the 2018 biopic about Queen and its late lead singer Freddie Mercury. That film, of course, is *Bohemian Rhapsody*, which currently holds the all-time box office record as the highest grossing music biopic of all time with a worldwide box office tally of $911 million. Now, six years after the film's triumph at the global box office and the Oscars, Michael is not only steadily approaching *Bohemian Rhapsody's* record box office take, the actor who plays Michael Jackson — his nephew Jaafar — is arguably already a contender for a Best Actor Oscar. And while it's true that $51 million seems like a lot of money to make as the film enters its seventh weekend in theaters, there are a couple of big reasons to believe Michael can still reach the box office pinnacle set by *Bohemian Rhapsody*.

recentArticles.title: Jay Silva, former UFC fighter, dead at 45 - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay Silva, former UFC fighter, dead at 45. Jay Silva, a longtime MMA fighter who competed in the UFC, died Sunday, according to Polish MMA promotion FAME. The cause of death has yet to be released. “It is with deep sadness that we announce the passing of FAME fighter Jay Silva. Through his performances, Jay brought a great smile, positive energy, and the professionalism of a true athlete,” FAME MMA wrote on social media. Silva’s two UFC bouts were against CB Dollaway at UFC Fight Night 19 in 2009 and Chris Leben at UFC Fight Night 20 in 2010. The former nightclub bouncer in New York developed his love for MMA after he watched the first season of the UFC’s “The Ultimate Fighter” television series in 2005. The native of Luanda, Angola, spent most of his career in cage fighting, competing in Superior Cage Combat, Bellator, and kickboxing competitions. “I want to be remembered as the greatest fighter the world has ever seen.
recentArticles.summary: 前UFC格鬥選手Jay Silva於45歲逝世，死因尚未公布。

recentArticles.title: Jeezy Focuses on Self-Love With Solo Date Nights - foxy99.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Jeezy Focuses on Self-Love With Solo Date Nights. Jeezy may be one of hip-hop’s biggest stars, but these days, his favorite date night companion is himself. The rapper and author recently shared that he isn’t rushing back into…. The rapper and author recently shared that he isn't rushing back into the dating scene. Instead, he's spending time focusing on self-love and enjoying solo outings. Rather than looking for a new relationship, Jeezy said he's taking time to focus on himself. "I’m dating myself right now and I feel like, as a man, you should always take time to be with yourself," Jeezy shared. One way he does that is with a weekly solo sushi date. "And I go out and I have a bottle of sake, a bottle of wine and my favorite sushi and date myself. Kayla is the midday host on Detroit’s 105.1 The Bounce.

recentArticles.title: NXNE Spotlight: Canadian Electronic Artist Frank Walker Finds His 'Oasis' in Crossing Genres - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: After hitting the top 10 on the Billboard Canada Airplay charts with his country-EDM Josh Ross and Norma Jean Martine collab "Lay It On Me," the Toronto producer will play his new sophomore album in full for fans at an exclusive Billboard Canada LIVE DJ set and Q&A during NXNE at SOUNDSTAGE on June 11. "It’s more of a creative oasis for me, finding that sanctuary where I have this cool sound that people know me for, but I'm also experimenting in other directions, whether it's different tempos, sounds and percussion, or collaborating with other producers.". The single became a hit on *Billboard Canada's* Airplay charts and reached the top 10 of the Canadian CHR/Top 40 chart in March after debuting in October, and it's still charting on both the Canada AC and Hot AC charts this week. The Toronto DJ cherishes that special connection between fans and music and is eager to bring that atmosphere to life onstage during his intimate Billboard Canada LIVE performance and Q&A on June 11 at SOUNDSTAGE, where he plans to play *Oasis* in full.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導加拿大電子音樂藝術家Frank Walker的新專輯《Oasis》及其在NXNE的演出。

recentArticles.title: ‘I Wanted to Start Off Scorching’: Ryan Beatty on His Exhilarating New Video for “Secret Language” - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘I Wanted to Start Off Scorching’: Ryan Beatty on His Exhilarating New Video for “Secret Language”. In the video for Ryan Beatty’s new single, “Secret Language”—released today as the first single off his fourth album, *Sweet Fortune*, arriving later this month—the musician stands against a Hockney blue California sky, throwing a paper plane into the air. You can feel that confidence on “Secret Language,” which captures, with Beatty’s signature precision, that overwhelming feeling of standing on the precipice of falling in love: “I love you, I say it in a secret language / Did you hear what my words couldn’t tell?” he croons on the final chorus, as horns begin to swell around him to a euphoric climax. What I love about it is that the lyrics are about saying it in a secret language, but the song itself feels so big, and there’s nothing secret about it.” Beatty recorded a demo of an earlier version of the track with his longtime musical collaborator, Ethan Gruska, and had the song lying around for a bit before finishing it in his boyfriend’s apartment in Boston.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Gets New Digital Release Date – How to Stream - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ Gets New Digital Release Date – How to Stream. Starring Michael Jackson's nephew, son of Jermaine Jackson, Jaafar Jackson, "Michael" follows the titular star from the early rise of The Jackson 5, through to Michael pursuing his solo career and breaking away from the band. The film is now heading for its home release, starting June 9 when it becomes available to rent and buy across Video on Demand platforms. It will then be available to purchase on physical media such as DVD, Blu-ray, and 4K Ultra HD from July 14. "Michael" will be available to watch digitally from June 9, 2026. "Michael" will be available to rent and buy across Video on Demand platforms such as Prime Video, Apple TV, and Fandango at Home from June 9. "Michael" does not yet have a streaming release set, but it will be available to rent and buy across Premium Digital and Premium Video on Demand platforms from June 9. + In the Mirror: Joe Jackson Time-lapse.

recentArticles.title: 6LACK on Presence, Purpose and His New Album, ‘Love is the New Gangsta’ - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # 6LACK on Presence, Purpose and His New Album, ‘Love is the New Gangsta’. “It’s time to really just let things go,” chart-topping R&B artist 6LACK says about the new chapter of life he explores on his latest album *Love is the New Gangsta*. The album arrives at a moment of visible transition for the Atlanta artist, who approaches this release with a clearer sense of purpose shaped by fatherhood, hard conversations and a renewed commitment to being present. A new baby was on the way. “This album was a turning point for me to just know I refuse to be like a shell of myself.”. Much of *Love is the New Gangsta* is rooted in what 6LACK learned by slowing down. “I was at every doctor’s appointment, I was in the midwife classes, I was in the doula classes,” he says. On *Love is the New Gangsta*, growth is presented as a daily practice—something expressed at home, in community, in music and within the self.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於R&B歌手6LACK的新專輯《Love is the New Gangsta》及其個人成長與為人父的經歷，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: As Drake rules the charts, the 'song of the summer' race heats up - WYSO Public Radio
recentArticles.snippet: Drake's *ICEMAN* holds at No. 1 in its second week on the *Billboard* 200 albums chart, and the rapper still has four songs in this week's top 10, led by "Janice STFU" at No. 1. The only song in this week's top 20 that *doesn't* qualify for Songs of the Summer in 2026 is Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean," which climbs to No. 19 on the Hot 100 thanks to renewed interest sparked by the horrendous Jackson biopic *Michael*. But the number is bound to drop in the coming weeks, as *ICEMAN* streaming subsides and major new releases enter the conversation: Olivia Rodrigo's new album, *you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love*, drops on June 12 — its latest single, "The Cure," debuts on both the Hot 100 and Songs of the Summer at No. 5 — while Ariana Grande readies a new record, *Petal*, for release on July 31.
recentArticles.summary: As Drake rules the charts, the 'song of the summer' race heats up - WYSO Public Radio

recentArticles.title: Ateez fills 14th EP with self-written songs - The Korea Herald
recentArticles.snippet: Ateez posted the full tracklist for its 14th mini album, “Golden Hour: Part 5,” on Friday via agency KQ Entertainment. The upcoming set will comprise five tracks, including the lead single “Bad.” Hongjoong and Mingi participated in writing lyrics for all songs that underline the range of the eight-member act’s music spectrum. The EP will be released on June 26, about four months after the previous EP, which hit the Billboard 200 at No. 3 and sold over 1.5 million copies in one week. Two days after the album drop, the group will perform at British Summer Time Hyde Park in London as a headliner. From June 17-19, it will host a fan meetup in Seoul, under the title “Atiny’s Voyage: Tiny Mystery.”. Nvidia founder and CEO Jensen Huang is set to touch down in Seoul on Friday afternoon, kicking off a four-day trip focused on deepening ties with South Korea’s tech, manufacturing and AI industries.

recentArticles.title: “Flower Drum Song” – A Culturally Powerful Production - ladancechronicle.com
recentArticles.snippet: Presented by East West Players and the Japanese American Cultural and Community Center, this was a newly revised version of **David Henry Hwang’s 2002 production** which was revised from the 1958 original with **music by Richard Rogers** and **lyrics by Oscar Hammerstein II.** The plot centers on Mei-Li, a refugee from China who makes a dramatic journey to the U.S. and joins the family of a friend of her fathers’ who is struggling with his Chinese Opera house while his son is set on a Western-style nightclub. Krista Marie Yu in Rogers and Hammerstein’s FLOWER DRUM SONG – Photo by Mike Palma. This is the 60th Anniversary of East West Players and they wanted to end on a special note which Hwang supplied by way of this new version of *“Flower Drum Song”.* In it there was an effort to update the power of the female leads which read very well.

recentArticles.title: After S.F. Ballet spotlight, this Grammy-winning musician brings new album to Berkeley - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # After S.F. Ballet spotlight, this Grammy-winning musician brings new album to Berkeley. Bay Area audiences had a recent reminder of his range during San Francisco Ballet’s “The Blake Works,” a William Forsythe program set to the British musician’s tracks, which opened Feb. 27, at the War Memorial Opera House. Now fans can hear Blake perform live when he brings his touring show behind his latest album, “Trying Times,” to the Greek Theatre on Thursday-Friday, June 11-12. Jameela Jamil (“The Good Place”), Blake’s longtime partner, is credited as executive producer and A&R on the album, with production credits on several tracks. She joined the Chronicle as a summer 2023 intern for the Datebook team. She is a recent graduate of UC San Diego, where she studied communications. She previously interned for the San Diego Union-Tribune and wrote for her campus newspaper, the Guardian, where she served as editor-in-chief.
recentArticles.summary: After S.F. Ballet spotlight, this Grammy-winning musician brings new album to Berkeley - San Francisco Chronicle

recentArticles.title: Grammy-winning singer Peabo Bryson suffers stroke - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: # Grammy-winning singer Peabo Bryson suffers stroke. Peabo Bryson, the Grammy Award-winning singer behind multiple R&B and Disney hits, has suffered a stroke. The South Carolina native is best known for the Disney hit duets "Beauty and the Beast" with Celine Dion and "A Whole New World" with singer-songwriter Regina Belle from the "Aladdin" soundtrack, which won back-to-back Grammys for best pop performance by a duo or group with vocals in 1993 and 1994, respectively. Bryson also had a string of hit singles with the late Roberta Flack, including "Tonight, I Celebrate My Love" and "You're Looking Like Love to Me" from the 1983 duet album "Born To Love," as well as "As Long as There's Christmas.". He is also known for several hit solo ballads, including "If Ever You're in My Arms Again" and "Can You Stop the Rain." "Can You Stop the Rain" was nominated for best R&B vocal performance in 1992.
recentArticles.summary: 葛萊美獎得主Peabo Bryson中風，其健康狀況引發關注。

recentArticles.title: A new Swedish candy shop is now open in the West Village! - NBC New York
recentArticles.snippet: New York Live 2 hours ago. # A new Swedish candy shop is now open in the West Village! Dahiana Pérez gets the scoop on Vännest, a new Swedish candy store in the West Village. ## Local. #### Elisse Junior St. Preux & Naturi Naughton-Lewis talk new Tribeca Festival movie. #### Zach Woods, Susan Sarandon, & Everly Carganilla on new Tribeca Festival movie. #### Former NY Knick Steve Novak says ‘sleep is for losers'. #### From swag to sweets, get ready to cheer on the Knicks! latestReport.daily_summary: 周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》近期備受矚目，已於3月25日發行，短短三天內銷售突破250萬張，狂吸逾4.6億元。同名主打歌MV耗資近億元，由好萊塢團隊在巴黎與台北拍攝，內容巧妙融合30幅世界名畫，以「吸血鬼咬了梵谷」概念呈現，引發藝術與創意討論。周杰倫透露創作靈感來自過去演唱會的負面經歷，MV中的「超狂選角」也令人驚艷。專輯的商業成功與藝術表現，再次彰顯周杰倫的影響力。

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》近期備受矚目，已於3月25日發行，短短三天內銷售突破250萬張，狂吸逾4.6億元。同名主打歌MV耗資近億元，由好萊塢團隊在巴黎與台北拍攝，內容巧妙融合30幅世界名畫，以「吸血鬼咬了梵谷」概念呈現，引發藝術與創意討論。周杰倫透露創作靈感來自過去演唱會的負面經歷，MV中的「超狂選角」也令人驚艷。專輯的商業成功與藝術表現，再次彰顯周杰倫的影響力。
周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》3月25日發行，MV耗資近1億台幣，由好萊塢團隊製作，巧妙融入30幅世界名畫，打造吸血鬼懸疑故事。專輯上線三天狂賣逾250萬張，吸金4.6億元，創華語MV製作費新高。周杰倫透露靈感源於恐慌經驗，雖評價兩極，但許多粉絲讚其找回早期感動。
周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》及同名主打歌MV近期成為焦點。MV耗資近億元，結合30幅世界名畫，打造吸血鬼懸疑故事，並強調未使用AI製作。專輯發行三天已賣破250萬張，狂吸4.6億元。儘管評價兩極，但其製作規模與藝術性仍引發熱議。

周杰倫近期推出新專輯首波主打歌〈太陽之子〉，引發廣泛關注。這支耗資近新台幣一億元打造的MV，不僅在巴黎及台北取景，更巧妙融合了梵谷、克林姆等30幅世界名畫，以吸血鬼懸案故事呈現，並強調拒絕使用AI技術。專輯上線短短三天，數位銷量便突破250萬張，狂吸超過4.6億元，展現驚人吸金實力，並登上iRadio金曲排行榜冠軍。儘管銷售成績亮眼，歌曲評價卻呈現兩極化，部分粉絲讚譽找回早期感動，但也有網友認為「不像以前」或「太像以前」，引發熱烈討論。MV發布會亦吸引萬人觀看，顯示其超高人氣。
周杰倫新專輯《太陽之子》於3/25發行，首波同名主打MV耗資近1億元，致敬30幅世界名畫，打造吸血鬼懸疑故事。數位專輯上線3天狂賣250萬張，吸金4.6億元，創下驚人商業成績。儘管外界評價兩極，但其MV的藝術性與高製作成本均引發熱烈討論，展現歌王霸氣回歸。
根據今日搜集到的新聞，未發現任何關於華語巨星周杰倫的相關報導。今日娛樂新聞焦點主要集中在歐美樂壇，包括Jay-Z在Roots Picnic上的精彩演出與對其他藝人的評論，Kanye West在土耳其的大型演唱會，以及Drake打破Michael Jackson紀錄等重大事件。整體而言，周杰倫今日並無媒體曝光或新動態。
今日搜集到的新聞中，並無任何關於周杰倫的相關報導。主要焦點集中在其他歐美藝人，如Jay-Z在Roots Picnic的演出、Kanye West在伊斯坦堡的演唱會，以及Drake打破Michael Jackson的紀錄等。此外，還有Jesse McCartney將在高中舞會表演，以及多位藝人的巡演消息。
